title: Gemma 4: Your Laptop's NEW AI Powerhouse! Open & Free! #shorts
summary: Gemma 4 is an open-source frontier AI model with an Apache 2.0 license designed for laptop deployment. The model features a unified architecture intended to make advanced AI more accessible to individual users.
